component.name: Local Site Manager
component.summary: Manage local development sites with Nginx, SSL, and PHP

description.p: Native GNOME desktop application for Ubuntu/Debian to manage local development sites. Generates Nginx configuration automatically, manages SSL certificates signed by a local 30-year CA, supports multiple PHP-FPM versions, reverse proxies to Node/Bun/Deno/Python/Go services, wildcard domains, and exposes a local REST API plus a CLI.
Initial release: core engine, CLI, REST API, GTK4 GUI, privileged helper.
